productDisplayName: Just Natural Unisex Black Photographers Jacket
description: Style NoteDesigned keeping in mind the needs of an adventurer, this Photographer's jacket from Just Naturals scores high on utility as well as style. Its multiple pockets provide ample storage space for all your essentials and its pure cotton composition lets you stay on your feet all day long.Product DetailsBlack woven jacket with black mesh lining, V-neck, metal detachable zipper down the front, sleeveless, binding around neck and armhole, embroidered branding on left chest, one bellow pocket with flap and Velcro fastening + one welt pocket with flap and Velcro fastening + one zippered pocket with two bellow pockets in front that have flaps and Velcro fastenings on the left, two bellow pockets at chest level that have flaps and Velcro fastenings + one welt pocket with flap and Velcro fastening + one zippered pocket with two bellow pockets in front that have flaps and Velcro fastenings on the right, metal ring detail at pockets at chest level, tabs with Velcro at shoulder, long zippered pocket at back, one welt and two patch pockets with flaps on the inside, loop above hemMaterials and CareCottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L.
